summary: iter141 — Multi-Challenger duel system tested. Backend 11/11 pytest passed. Frontend MultiAttemptsView renders correctly with leaderboard, stats, action button. /api/duel/me/sent auth-gated (401 unauth, 200 + items for Alice).

minor.issue: Initial preview cold-start gave one transient 502 (recovered on retry — preview env warm-up only, not a code issue)

issues: Leaderboard row items have no data-testid (e.g. 'leaderboard-row-{rank}'); rank pill / score cell / outcome badge unselectable for E2E tests. Recommend adding data-testid on each row.

backend.TestMeSent.test_me_sent_alice_returns_se: PASS — Alice sees seed duel with participants>=3, aggregates correct
backend.TestMultiGuards.test_initiator_cannot_st: PASS — 400 'Vous ne pouvez pas vous défier vous-même'
backend.TestDuelKind.test_get_duel_returns_multi: PASS — duel_kind=multi_attempts, opponent NULL (not locked), multi_stats present

frontend./duel/jAY9zih8qJCn6t__IeaS_A: PASS — MultiAttemptsView rendered. Header 'DÉFI QUOTIDIEN · CLASSEMENT'. Initiator Alice 3/5 ⏱2.6s. Stats: Participants=3, Meilleur=1/5, Battent A=0/3. Bouton 'Relever le défi' visible (non-auth user). Classement (3 challengers): Bob 1/5, Charlie 1/5, Dave 0/5 — tous 'Perdu'. Boutons Partager WhatsApp + Copier le lien + Retour aux jeux présents.
frontend.Classic-1v1-not-rendered: PASS — duel-preview-view selector returned 0 elements (correct — multi mode active)
frontend.Sorting-by-score-then-time: PASS — Bob (1/5, 2.5s) #1 before Charlie (1/5, 2.6s) #2 before Dave (0/5) #3

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid attributes to MultiAttemptsView leaderboard rows + 'Mes défis envoyés' button so future E2E tests can rely on stable selectors instead of text content.
(Optional) The login endpoint sometimes takes ~30-45s on cold preview (caused 1 transient 502 + 1 timeout in a 11-test run). Consider warming up the backend or investigating slow login init.
critical_code_review_comments: duel.py:191 — duel_kind fallback `row['duel_kind'] if 'duel_kind' in row.keys()` repeated 5+ times in the same file; could be extracted to a tiny helper `_duel_kind(row)` for DRY.

duel.py:1245 my_sent_duels — uses 5 sub-SELECTs in same query. With heavy duels per user this is N+M queries via correlated subselects; a single LEFT JOIN aggregate would be cheaper at scale (low priority — fine for now).
duel.py:1140 — `get_current_user(request)` wrapped in try/except returns me_id=None on any error. Good. But OK considering /leaderboard is public on purpose.

duel.py — File is now 1372 lines, approaching the 700-line guideline ceiling already breached. Consider splitting into duel_create.py / duel_play.py / duel_views.py / duel_admin.py for the next refactor.
test_credentials: Used per memory/test_credentials.md: alice@japap.com/Alice2026!, bob@japap.com/Test1234!, with TURNSTILE_TEST_BYPASS_TOKEN=JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026
seed_data_creation: None — used the existing seed token jAY9zih8qJCn6t__IeaS_A created by main agent (Alice 3/5 + 3 attempts Bob/Charlie/Dave).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-challenger backend is stable. /api/duel/{token}/leaderboard, /api/duel/me/sent, multi_attempts guards (no self-submit, no double-submit, no opponent_id lock) all work. Frontend MultiAttemptsView is correct on the seed token. NOT YET TESTED end-to-end: (1) auto-creation of multi_attempts duel via POST /api/quiz/daily-challenge/submit (left to main agent — needs deletion of quiz_daily_challenge_runs row first to avoid 'already played today' error), (2) live submit flow by a brand-new challenger (would consume a daily-cap slot for an account), (3) /duel/me/sent UI page rendering when authenticated (preview env was slow on the 2nd navigation). The 'Mes défis envoyés' button DOES NOT appear for unauth users — by design, only for initiator.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found in this iteration.
